issues: Extraneous items included: Bonecrusher (13116), Berserker ring (11773), Amulet of strength (1725), Crystal halberd (23987), Mixed hide cape (29289), Death rune (560), Magic shortbow (12788), Rune arrow (892), Rock cake (2379), Rune crossbow (9185), Zombie axe (28810), Fire cape (6570), Mixed hide boots (29286), Prayer potion (2434) - these are melee/slayer/unrelated items not needed for chinchompa catching and Ranged training
Irrelevant abstract item: 'melee gear' is not mentioned or used in this Ranged-focused step
Unresolved item 'elite void ranged' is ambiguous - should be split into specific void items (top, bottom, gloves, etc.)
Missing void gloves (void ranger gloves) and void legs from the elite void set items
notes: Step is primarily about catching red/black chinchompas for Ranged XP and completing Western Provinces Hard Diary. Core items (chins, elite void, ranging pots, glory, shayzien boots) are correctly identified. However, the items array includes numerous melee and slayer-related gear that are not part of this step's actual requirements. The unresolved items capture some genuine ambiguities but 'elite void ranged' is too vague. Abstract items correctly capture cash stack and ranged gear, but melee gear abstraction should be removed.
